overview: A fresh fish e-commerce store where customers browse and buy fresh clean-cut fish, dry fish, chutneys, fish masala, and other spice blends. Features a product catalog with categories, shopping cart, Stripe checkout, and an admin panel to manage products.
features: Product catalog with categories (fresh fish, dry fish, chutneys, masalas)
Product detail pages with size/weight options and pricing
Admin panel with product management and image upload
